config.safepaths.requiredPasses.tooltip: Number of times you must step on the same block to compress it into a path.
config.safepaths.constructionTime.toolti: Time window to reach the required footsteps. If you don't reach the target within this time, your progress resets. (24,000 ticks = 1 Minecraft Day).
config.safepaths.enableSpeedBoost.toolti: Grants a speed boost while walking on path blocks.
config.safepaths.speedMultiplier.tooltip: Higher value = faster movement. 0.2 matches Speed I (+20% total movement speed).
config.safepaths.decayTime.tooltip: How long an unused path stays before reverting. (24,000 ticks = 1 Minecraft Day | 72,000 ticks = 3 Minecraft Days).
